title: Two US service members reported missing in Morocco, officials say
summary_full: A search and rescue operation is underway for the service members, who are believed to have been involved in an accident, according to authorities.
summary_public: A search and rescue operation is underway for the service members, who are believed to have been involved in an accident, according to authorities.
